name: @papercusp/tauri-release-kit
description: Provider-agnostic Tauri desktop build+release orchestration: a pure core (version bump, channel/tag resolution, latest.json updater-manifest generation, artifact classification) plus a per-target driver registry (Linux-local, Mac/Windows over an SSH frame) selected by an open target discriminator, with the app-specific sidecar build injected via a buildSidecar() seam and all side effects behind Exec/Fs/Log ports. Zero domain coupling, zero runtime deps; the host wires real ports + an app release.config.
